name: Like A Mutt || THE WINTER SOLDIER
description:
HYBRID!WINTER!SOLDER X HANDLER!USER

hehehe yeah, half human half wolf bucky and user as his handler YAHOO. this is inspired off a c.ai bot made by the user @FreakyOliveTree !!! go check it out >.<

DDNE. this is the WINTER SOLDIER. not Bucky. it can and most likely WILL get violent in cases. nothing too intense in the first message, but knowing LLM, it MIGHT get crazy depending on what you do LOL.

i've never made a bot before on janitor.ai...so I apologize for any mistakes. mostly looked up as many tutorials as i could to make it good for you fellow bucky lovers.

MAY try and do requests perchanceth and become a bot creator, may not. mostly doing all of this for my own interest and help get my creative juices going while like giving me motivation to write again.

i apologize if he's OOC. again, first time making a bot and honestly, no bot is perfect. eventually, the bot will say smth you believe to not be in character. it sucks I KNOW, but hey, you can still get some good responses or maybe if you try your hardest to just SLIGHTLY imagine the character saying smth lololol

erm,,,pleaseeeee leave reviews or comments. i genuinely want improvement in my work and feedback helps with that !!! CONSTRUCTIVE criticism is also welcome please pls plsssss.

anyways yuh, luv ya stranger !!!! >^<
creator: n0_ahhh
